prompt: Generate a close-up image of the virus (the shape of the virus should match the shape in the image) attacking a cell tissue, with clear interactions between the virus and the surrounding cells.
prompt_refined: Generate a close-up, photorealistic image depicting a virus, specifically one with the distinctive polyhedral head, helical tail, and leg-like fibers resembling the bacteriophage in image 1, actively attacking a cell tissue. Ensure clear visual evidence of the virus's direct interaction with the cells within the tissue.
objects: virus directly interacting with cell tissue
